_comment: PHASE-7 (METHOD-02) AUDIT-SANDBOXED jscpd (copy-paste detector) config. Deep extension of M1 docs/audit/instrumentation/.jscpd.json. Targets src/*.cts (the source of truth) AND the full prompt corpus (workflows, references, agents, commands). NEVER targets the gitignored compiled gsd-core/bin/lib/*.cjs (false-dup guard: source/artifact .cts<->.cjs pairs would register as 100% clones). NOT wired into the package devDeps/CI (D-01). Run from repo root: npx -y jscpd --config docs/audit/comprehensive/instrumentation/.jscpd.json
